regions.text: I have it in my hand. I am putting it between the other two books. Then it will be with the other books.
Now it is on the shelf again. It was in my hand. I had it in my hand. It is not in my hand. Where is it?
What do you see in the room?
Do you see the floor and three walls of the room?
Do you see a door and two windows?
Is one of the windows open?
Do you see two seats and the bookshelves between them?
Do you see the clock over the bookshelves?
These things are in the room. The room is in a house.
